title: Conversion Rate Optimization Services
metaTitle: Conversion Rate Optimization Services | CRO & A/B Testing - Miami, FL
metaDescription: Increase conversions with data-driven CRO services. A/B testing, landing page optimization, and funnel analysis. Expert CRO consulting in Miami, Florida.
heroSubtitle: Turn more visitors into customers with systematic testing and data-driven optimization.
introduction: I help businesses maximize revenue from existing traffic through rigorous conversion rate optimization. Using A/B testing, funnel analysis, and behavioral data, I identify exactly where you're losing conversions and implement changes that measurably increase your bottom line.

benefits.title: More Revenue, Same Traffic
benefits.description: A 20% conversion rate increase means 20% more customers without spending more on ads. CRO is the highest-ROI marketing investment.

benefits.title: Data Over Opinions
benefits.description: Stop guessing what works. Every change is tested and validated with statistical significance before full rollout.

benefits.title: Compound Growth
benefits.description: Small wins stack up. A series of 5-10% improvements across your funnel can double conversions over time.

services.name: Conversion Audit
services.description: Comprehensive analysis of your funnel using analytics, heatmaps, session recordings, and user research to identify conversion blockers.

services.name: A/B Testing Programs
services.description: Design and run statistically rigorous A/B tests on headlines, CTAs, layouts, pricing, and other conversion-impacting elements.

services.name: Landing Page Optimization
services.description: Redesign and optimize landing pages for specific campaigns, audiences, and conversion goals—backed by testing data.

services.name: Funnel Analysis
services.description: Map your entire customer journey, identify drop-off points, and implement targeted optimizations at each stage.

cta.title: Ready to Increase Conversions?
cta.description: Get a free conversion audit and discover quick wins that can boost your conversion rate this quarter.

faqs.question: What conversion rate should I expect?
faqs.answer: It depends on your industry and traffic source. E-commerce averages 2-3%, SaaS free trials 3-5%, lead gen forms 5-15%. More important than benchmarks is YOUR improvement trajectory. A well-run CRO program typically improves conversions 20-50% in the first year through systematic testing.

faqs.question: How long do A/B tests need to run?
faqs.answer: Tests need enough data for statistical significance—typically 2-4 weeks depending on your traffic volume. Running tests too short leads to false positives; too long wastes time. I calculate required sample sizes upfront and set clear stopping rules for every test.

faqs.question: What if my traffic is too low for A/B testing?
faqs.answer: Low-traffic sites can still do CRO effectively. I use qualitative research methods (user testing, surveys, heatmaps) to identify issues, then implement best-practice changes. For testing, I focus on high-impact elements with large expected effect sizes that require smaller sample sizes to detect.

faqs.question: How do you prioritize what to test?
faqs.answer: I use a framework balancing potential impact (based on funnel analysis), confidence (based on research and best practices), and effort (implementation complexity). High-traffic pages with clear problems get tested first. I also look for 'quick wins'—changes with strong evidence that can ship without testing.
